name: Vaylantz Wave - Master Phase
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴァリアンツ＝ウェーブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マスターフェイズ
desc:
Once per turn, if a card in the Monster Zone moves to another Monster Zone (except during the Damage Step): You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Level 5 or higher "Vaylantz" monsters you currently control gain 1200 ATK until the end of this turn.
● Send this face-up card from the Spell & Trap Zone to the GY, then target 1 Effect Monster in your opponent's Main Monster Zone; place that opponent's monster face-up as a Continuous Spell in their Spell & Trap Zone in its same column. (If the zone is occupied, destroy the occupying card.)

action: Activates if moved to another Zone
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
